hero.subtitle: TuranLogix — freight forwarding and cargo transportation across Kazakhstan. Trucks, vans, and consolidated shipments.

services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: Full range of freight forwarding services

ftl.title: Full Truckload (FTL)
ftl.desc: Transport of large cargo batches — one truck for one client. Ideal for high volumes and urgent deliveries.

ltl.title: Less Than Truckload (LTL)
ltl.desc: Economical transport of smaller batches alongside other cargo. Pay only for the space you use.

express.title: Express Delivery
express.desc: Urgent delivery within 24-48 hours. Vans and light trucks for fast shipments.

cargo.title: China Cargo
cargo.desc: Consolidated shipments from China. Consolidation, customs clearance, delivery to warehouse in Kazakhstan.

docs.title: Documentation
docs.desc: Full support: contracts, waybills, CMR, acts. Electronic signature via NCALayer.

tracking.title: Tracking
tracking.desc: Real-time order monitoring. Notifications via Telegram, Email and WhatsApp.

routes.title: Popular Routes
routes.subtitle: Regular departures on main Kazakhstan destinations

calculator.title: Price Calculator
calculator.subtitle: Get an estimate for your shipment
calculator.disclaimer: Exact price is agreed individually. Call us or submit a request.

chat.title: AI Assistant
chat.subtitle: Ask a question or place an order right here
chat.placeholder: Write your question or describe the cargo...
chat.welcome: Hello! I'm the TuranLogix AI assistant. I can help you calculate the cost, answer questions or take a freight order. What are you interested in?
chat.order_hint: Want to place an order? Tell me: origin, destination, weight and cargo type.
quick_prompts: How much does it cost to ship 1 ton from Almaty to Astana?
How to place a freight order?
What documents are needed for cargo?
chat.hint: Enter — send · Shift+Enter — new line · Responses are AI-generated, verify important data
chat.error: Sorry, a connection error occurred. Please try again later or contact us directly: +7 700 123 45 67

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: TuranLogix — trusted freight forwarder
about.desc: We specialize in cargo transportation across Kazakhstan. We work with individuals and businesses, providing full documentation support and prompt status updates.

errors.server_error: Server error. Please try again later.
